title: The Reason Why 'Uthman Removed Sai d from Kufah and Named al- Walid His Governor There
description: Kufah and Named al-Wald His Governor There It was transmitted to me in writing by al-Sari-Shu'ayb-Sayf'Amr-al-Sha'bi: The first satanically inspired event among the inhabitants of Kufah-which was the first garrison town in Islam where Satan instigated evil among (its people)-happened (in this way]. Sa'd b. Abi Waggag sought a loan from the public treasury from'Abdallih b. Mas'ud, 26 and he issued it to him. But when (Ibn Mas'ud) demanded repayment, (Sa'd) was unable to do so. Words arose between the two of them, to the point that 'Abdallah sought 26.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
